emails.subject: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account
emails.body: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account Gerri, I assume this is for all commodities at EDF Man, would Frank have the break down in about 1 hour Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account
emails.body: Hi Dutch, You are correct, this is the related master number. I would guess that by 9:30 ish Frank should have his numbers finalized, as my report is complete and ready for him to load. I have not been forecasting EDF's number with treasury....if you believe that they will be sending this amount, please let me know so that I may inform treasury. Thanks! gg

emails.subject: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account
emails.body: Hi Dutch, You are correct, this is the related master number. I would guess that by 9:30 ish Frank should have his numbers finalized, as my report is complete and ready for him to load. I have not been forecasting EDF's number with treasury....if you believe that they will be sending this amount, please let me know so that I may inform treasury. Thanks! gg

emails.subject: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account
emails.body: Gerri Frank gave me the info that per the EDF statement NG margin is 17,062,684 with them From what you see is this number possible Dutch

emails.subject: RE: EDF Man-Excess on Account
emails.body: Hi Dutch, Yes, I would think this is possible because the overall margin excess is $24,296,123.00. Unfortunately, I don't see any "breakdowns" on the numbers. Hope this helps! gg
